description: Use this API routine to modify the data of an existing Time Series Power Flow profile curve value. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = tspf_profiledata_chng(curvesetid,curvecol,index,value)

parameters.name: curvesetid
parameters.description: Profile curve set number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: curvecol
parameters.description: Profile curve col number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Curve value index. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: The time point of the given profile curve set and curve number not found.
Prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
